REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JOHN MORIARTY NOTICE OF DEFENDANT MORIARTYS MOTION AND MOTION FOR SANCTIONS PURSUANT TO CCP 128.7 IS DENIED. THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS NOT FILED FOR AN IMPROPER PURPOSE AND IS NOT INDISPUTABLY WITHOUT MERIT. (CODE CIV. PROC.,128.7.) THE COURT CANNOT RESOLVE DISPUTED FACTUAL ISSUES AT THIS TIME. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Defendant Moriartys Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 128.7
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Bryan Kurtz, 888.510.7511 of Tenant Law Gropu appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Austin Farley.
Emily Lowther, 415.956.5100 of Zacks, Freeman & Patterson, PC appearing via Zoom for Defendant John Moriarty.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN MORIARTY Notice Of Defendant Moriartys Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 128.7 is DENIED. The first amended complaint was not filed for an improper purpose and is not indisputably without merit. (Code Civ. Proc.,128.7.) The Court cannot resolve disputed factual issues at this time. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
